Option 1: Featured Quote (Dark Background)
"
Guest Experiences
"From the moment the RIB approached Dunia Baru, the whole family were in awe. This is not just one of the most beautiful vessels in Asian waters, it is also the most attentively cared for. The attention to detail was immediately apparent. The pride that the team take in getting every detail polished and prepared for guests is a tribute to their love of this yacht."
Dunia Baru Charter Guest London, United Kingdom
Option 3: Image + Quote Split
Guest Experiences
"If only every day was a day aboard Dunia Baru. The crew has done above and beyond the call of duty to make sure that we all felt incredibly well taken care of. I don't know how to thank everyone!"
Dunia Baru Charter Guest London, United Kingdom
Option 4: Minimal (White Background)
"
"Raja Ampat is the most beautiful place I've ever visited, and our trip was made even better by being on board Rascal. Everything—the gorgeous interiors, delicious meals, the friendly crew, the amazing activities—exceeded our expectations. We'll definitely be back."
Rascal Charter Guest Singapore
